title: Guwahati, Assam — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Guwahati, Assam: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Guwahati is a city in Assam with a population of 1,200,000. The largest city in Northeast India, a gateway to the Seven Sister states, known for its temples, wildlife, and Brahmaputra River.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
